title: Cirrus: Skip build all commits test on master
body:
Fixes:

    git rebase origin/ -x make
    fatal: Needed a single revision
    invalid upstream 'origin/'
    make: *** [Makefile:351: build-all-new-commits] Error 1

By not running this test post-merge.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude PTAL, this will fix the post-merge test failures we get on master since PR #1996 (it was an honest mistake).
